task: Review the flow and determine whether the primary task can be completed clearly and confidently.
frictionPoints: The buttons on the cards could be more prominent to aid in decision-making speed
The distinction between the features of each plan could be more visually clear to support quick comparisons
confusionPoints: The purpose of the 'Go to Builder' button on the Free plan is not immediately clear in the context of plan selection
recommendations: Visually differentiate the features between plans to facilitate rapid comparison
Consider using a summary or highlight section at the top of the page to provide a quick overview of the plans and their key benefits
Use more prominent calls-to-action to guide the user through the decision-making process quickly and confidently
